message:
Add web adapter wrapping forked superpowers-chrome CDP library

Copies chrome-ws-lib.js and host-override.js from superpowers-chrome
into src/adapters/web/lib/, implements WebAdapter behind the Adapter
interface with tools: screenshot, click, type, press, navigate,
extract, eval, wait_for. Wires web adapter into CLI run command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
